Topics.Name: TinklesGrudge
SimPlayerActivations: Does anyone else think Tinkles holds a grudge? Asking for Paul.
Tinkles flew past three other people to come after me. Explain that.
Real talk: does Tinkles remember who killed her?
Responses: It's just pathfinding. Probably. I hope.
She hovers by the ruins waiting for me. Not joking.
Paul has died to Tinkles four times, so yes.
She remembers. Faeries always remember.
I sell faerie repellent, whisper me. (It's just a stick.)
End: anyway, watch your back out there.
this guild has a faerie problem.

Topics.Name: FishingSpots
Responses: Anywhere quiet. The fish can hear you complaining.
Marla guards her spots like raid loot, good luck getting one.
Ripper's Keep if you're high enough to walk there. The faeries watch you fish.
Wherever Tinkles isn't patrolling. So not Faerie's Brake.

Topics.Name: LakeMonster
Responses: I have SEEN it. Nobody believes me.
The ripples are too big for fish. Just saying.
Whatever it is, it's why I stay out of the water now.
Old-timers say don't swim past the drop-off. I listen.

Topics.Name: GardenRun
SimPlayerActivations: Who's actually cleared Azynthi's Garden? Asking for planning purposes.
Serious question: is the guild ready for a Garden run?
Responses: Ready when you are. My gear says otherwise but my heart is ready.
Give me two more levels and im in.
Seen the entrance once. That counts for something right?
We'd need every healer online at once. So, never.
Plan it and they will come. Eventually. Maybe.

Topics.Name: SivakayaLore
SimPlayerActivations: Hot take: Sivakaya is a victim, not a villain. Azynthi did the actual crime.
Been reading about the War of the Gods. We live in the aftermath and nobody talks about it.
Why did Brax just LEAVE? The whole Godless Age was avoidable.
Responses: Azynthi tricked her and took everything she was. Thats not a villain, thats a tragedy.
The Wisp have the right idea. Somebody should light that candle.
Brax buried a whole region in ash to save the rest of us. Imagine that grief.
All i know is the cultists hit hard and dont negotiate.
The scholars wrote it all down. Reading is free.

Topics.Name: AzureGuardWatch
SimPlayerActivations: Does the Azure Guard seem extra jumpy to anyone else lately?
Friendly reminder that Merosavilla BANNED travel here. We live in the quarantine zone.
Responses: They hang people at the port. HANG. And we just walk past it.
Sivakayan activity is up. Thats the whole reason for the ban.
Merosavilla makes the rules, the Guard just swings the rope.
Not saying be nice to the Guard. Saying dont be interesting to them.
Still the safest city on the continent. Low bar, but still.
End: you didnt hear it from me.

Topics.Name: NamedBossBrags
SimPlayerActivations: Whats everyones proudest named kill? And no, Tinkles doesnt count.
Grizzlepaw finally went down for me today. Years of grudge, one loot roll.
Responses: Fearantula. My arachnophobia and i beat it together.
Massia the Fallen, first try, no deaths. Witnesses: zero, sadly.
The Abyssal Lord owes me three deaths back.
Rattlewrists. Everyone starts somewhere ok.
Pyroclast. The whole raid heard me scream and i regret nothing.

Topics.Name: PlanarRaids
SimPlayerActivations: Which plane is the guild running next? I need the practice.
Got my first rune put together. The planes are real, people.
Raid night when? The planes are not going to clear themselves.
Responses: You craft a rune, you open a portal at the reliquary, you meet a god. Simple. Terrifying.
The corruptor is in every single plane. Start asking why.
Valor is an arena. Eight rounds. Pace yourselves.
The willow one hurt my heart. Fernalla deserved better.
Bring resists for the elements plane or bring a second set of gear.

Topics.Name: BlessedGear
SimPlayerActivations: Just got my first blessed drop. The glow is everything.
Is anyone saving planar stones or do we all just sell them?
Responses: Blue glow is nice. Purple glow is a lifestyle.
Eight shards and a resolving fluid make a stone, if you hate money.
The otherworldly box mold does the upgrade. Do not ask what its otherworldly FROM.
Winkles dropped my first blessed piece. I said thank you. To a faerie.
Save the stones. Future you is begging you.
End: may the glow be with you.

Topics.Name: SivakayanSightings
SimPlayerActivations: Another sighting on the roads last night. Sivakayans, again.
The guard doubled patrols at the gate. Somebody knows something.
My cousin swears she saw cultists in the treeline. Everyone stay sharp.
Responses: The travel ban exists for a reason. This is the reason.
They move through the forests and swamps. Stay on the roads.
The ones who stayed with her went demonic. Thats not a rumor, thats history.
Port Azure closed its gates once already. It can happen again.
Report it to the azure guard and then walk the other way.
